hero.heading: A 2% drop in hydration cuts your strength by up to 20%.
hero.subtext: Muscles are 75% water. Electrolytes carry the signal from brain to muscle. Skip hydration mid-session and you're not just thirsty — you're weaker, slower, and leaving gains on the floor.

reframe.heading: Most hydration products are built for cardio. That’s the problem.
reframe.subtext: Long-duration endurance training and heavy resistance training do not place the same demands on the body. Your formula should reflect that.
reframe.enduranceBody: 500–1,000mg sodium. 11–21g sugar. 0mg magnesium. Built to replace large sweat losses over long cardio sessions. Great for a marathon. Overbuilt and misaligned for the weight room.
reframe.strengthBody: 234mg sodium. 0g sugar. 120mg magnesium for muscle function. 10mg zinc for recovery. 1g taurine for performance under load. A cleaner formula for what actually happens when you lift.
reframe.closing: Strength training demands a different formula. Impossible Powders is built for it.

magnesium.title: Magnesium
magnesium.desc: Supports normal muscle function, energy metabolism, and recovery. 120mg per serving — 32% of your daily value.

zinc.title: Zinc
zinc.desc: Supports protein synthesis and contributes to normal testosterone levels. 10mg per serving — 100% of your daily value.

taurine.title: Taurine
taurine.desc: 1,000mg to support performance, help reduce oxidative stress, and delay fatigue during high-intensity training.

showcase.productImageAlt: Impossible Powders electrolyte sachet for strength training

science.heading: Backed by research, not sports drink marketing
science.body: Every ingredient is here for a reason. Every meaningful claim is aligned with authorised European standards. The complete formula has also been reviewed through independent university validation.
points: EFSA-authorised health claims on magnesium, zinc, and potassium
All minerals kept within EU Tolerable Upper Intake Levels — safe even at 2 servings per day
Independent university validation of the complete formula
